org.siprop.v2.b2bua
Interface B2BUAModule

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSIPB2BUAModule, AsteriskB2BUA
public interface B2BUAModule

Sequence(scripting) processing is described to this interface.

Author:
noritsuna
